creator: hokaadam@gmail.com
text:
I have random reboots on freebsd 6.2 

i tried to turn off acpi, and disable all kernel modules, which i put into
loader.conf.

the crash occurred on a fresh install too. i tried to use the computer
without sound card and video card too (and Xorg off course not loaded),
it was used as a simple gateway, with minimal load, and it was also
crashing in that way.

How-To-Repeat: these crashes are random, but i can reproduce them by starting a game in
tremulous.
